raw_consumer_statement: To whom it may concern. I have been a long time customer from macys. I never had any issues. Recently I ordered todler clothes. I con an email saying it's delivered at my mail box. Upon checking I didn't receive anything. I tried to resolve this with macys they dismissed me by saying there's nothing we can do. Your responsibility is to pay. Pay for something i.never received. It's unbelievable I need help please I'm sure this isn't legal.
